title: Wayfinder
summary: A streaming travel planner proving Octane parallel use, out-of-order Suspense reveals, abort isolation, strict CSP, and hydration adoption.

journeys.title: Stream a real trip shell, reveal later weather before earlier fares, and complete a mutually gated parallel plan
Adopt a nonce-protected server trip and preserve a note typed before delayed hydration
Plan and save a city by keyboard, change its month, and restore it from the deep-linked shelf
Abort a slow destination search and keep a rapid trip switch on the latest route after stale work settles
Recover search and forecast failures, clear an empty result, and use the planner at mobile width

faultScenarios.description: The hydrateDelay query leaves real server trip content editable before hydration so DOM adoption and note preservation remain observable.
The later weather boundary resolves before the earlier fare boundary, producing a deterministic out-of-order stream without a live service.
Route and stay resources cannot complete unless both independent use creations start, turning parallel discovery into a functional result rather than a timing assertion.
The lo search is deliberately slower than ky; a native AbortController cancels it and late work cannot replace the current result.
The outage query fails once and returns a deterministic city after an explicit retry.
The weather-failure scenario streams an error arm once and succeeds through the public retry action.
